name: X-Force: Internal Host Communication with Malware URL
notes: This rule triggers when a local host loads a web URL known to host malware. This is often more accurate than detecting communication with an IP known to host malware as legitimate web hosts are often exploited to host malware.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Remote
when the event matches XFORCE_URL_CATEGORY("URL") = 'Malware' OR XFORCE_URL_CATEGORY("URL Host") = 'Malware' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY X-Force: Internal Host Communication with Malware URL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Remote
AND when the event matches XFORCE_URL_CATEGORY("URL") = 'Malware' OR XFORCE_URL_CATEGORY("URL Host") = 'Malware' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Internal Host Communication with Malware Host
Event description: This rule will notify when an internal client loads a web URL known to host malware.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
